description: Dual delta classifier with query. Logistic regression over [query_emb | response_emb - gemini_emb | response_emb - qwen_emb] (2304-dim). Combines the dual-provider advantage of setup113 with query context. Completes the delta family matrix: compare against setup113 (dual delta, no query) and setup117 (single delta, with query) to isolate both contributions independently. Frozen encoder, no fine-tuning.
